videos.headline: JMU puts the first TD on the board
videos.description: James Madison's QB Cole Johnson sneaks in for a short touchdown vs. Sam Houston.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (JMU puts the first TD on the board) 2021/05/08 ESHEET

videos.headline: Johnson, Wells connect for another JMU TD
videos.description: Cole Johnson gets the 4-yard pass perfectly in the hands of Antwane Wells Jr. as the Dukes extend their lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Johnson, Wells connect for another JMU TD) 2021/05/08 ESHEET

videos.headline: Dukes end the half with another TD
videos.description: Cole Johnson's 7-yard touchdown pass to Clayton Cheatham gives James Madison a cushioned gap going into the locker rooms.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Dukes end the half with another TD) 2021/05/08 ESHEET
